'''âdh-j-n''' ('''kadhajan''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vamper|vamper]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-j-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vamper|vamper]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âdh-j-n
|-
! Lemma
| kadhajan
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidhajan|thidhajan]] || [[word:jidhajan|jidhajan]] || [[word:shidhajan|shidhajan]] || [[word:kidhajan|kidhajan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudhajan|thuthudhajan]] || [[word:jujudhajan|jujudhajan]] || [[word:shushudhajan|shushudhajan]] || [[word:kukudhajan|kukudhajan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudhajan|thudhajan]] || [[word:judhajan|judhajan]] || [[word:shudhajan|shudhajan]] || [[word:kudhajan|kudhajan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudhajan|thudhajan]] || [[word:judhajan|judhajan]] || [[word:shudhajan|shudhajan]] || [[word:kudhajan|kudhajan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedhajan|thedhajan]] || [[word:jedhajan|jedhajan]] || [[word:shedhajan|shedhajan]] || [[word:kedhajan|kedhajan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodhajan|thothodhajan]] || [[word:jojodhajan|jojodhajan]] || [[word:shoshodhajan|shoshodhajan]] || [[word:kokodhajan|kokodhajan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodhajan|thodhajan]] || [[word:jodhajan|jodhajan]] || [[word:shodhajan|shodhajan]] || [[word:kodhajan|kodhajan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodhajan|thodhajan]] || [[word:jodhajan|jodhajan]] || [[word:shodhajan|shodhajan]] || [[word:kodhajan|kodhajan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠdhajan|thĂŠdhajan]] || [[word:jĂŠdhajan|jĂŠdhajan]] || [[word:shĂŠdhajan|shĂŠdhajan]] || [[word:kĂŠdhajan|kĂŠdhajan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadhajan|thathadhajan]] || [[word:jajadhajan|jajadhajan]] || [[word:shashadhajan|shashadhajan]] || [[word:kakadhajan|kakadhajan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadhajan|thadhajan]] || [[word:jadhajan|jadhajan]] || [[word:shadhajan|shadhajan]] || [[word:kadhajan|kadhajan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadhajan|thadhajan]] || [[word:jadhajan|jadhajan]] || [[word:shadhajan|shadhajan]] || [[word:kadhajan|kadhajan]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shadhajan|shadhajan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshadhajan|goshadhajan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishadhajan|gokishadhajan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shadhajanĂŒ|shadhajanĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshadhajanknĂŒ|goshadhajanknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhajanĂŒ|gokishadhajanĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shadhajanshĂ«|shadhajanshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshadhajankshĂ«|goshadhajankshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishadhajanshĂ«|gokishadhajanshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhajanro|shadhajanro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhajankro|goshadhajankro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhajanro|gokishadhajanro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhajanmu|shadhajanmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhajankmu|goshadhajankmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhajanmu|gokishadhajanmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shadhajansher|shadhajansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshadhajanksher|goshadhajanksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishadhajansher|gokishadhajansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shadhajang|shadhajang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshadhajankng|goshadhajankng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishadhajang|gokishadhajang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shadhajanya|shadhajanya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshadhajankya|goshadhajankya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishadhajanya|gokishadhajanya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shadhajanyam|shadhajanyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshadhajankyam|goshadhajankyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishadhajanyam|gokishadhajanyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhajanĂŒshĂ«|shadhajanĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhajanknĂŒshĂ«|goshadhajanknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhajanĂŒshĂ«|gokishadhajanĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhajanĂŒro|shadhajanĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhajanknĂŒro|goshadhajanknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhajanĂŒro|gokishadhajanĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhajanĂŒmu|shadhajanĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhajanknĂŒmu|goshadhajanknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhajanĂŒmu|gokishadhajanĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhajanshĂ«nĂŒ|shadhajanshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhajankshĂ«nĂŒ|goshadhajankshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhajanshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishadhajanshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhajanshĂ«ro|shadhajanshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhajankshĂ«ro|goshadhajankshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhajanshĂ«ro|gokishadhajanshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhajanshĂ«mu|shadhajanshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhajankshĂ«mu|goshadhajankshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhajanshĂ«mu|gokishadhajanshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhajanronĂŒ|shadhajanronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhajankronĂŒ|goshadhajankronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhajanronĂŒ|gokishadhajanronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhajanroshĂ«|shadhajanroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhajankroshĂ«|goshadhajankroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhajanroshĂ«|gokishadhajanroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhajanromu|shadhajanromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhajankromu|goshadhajankromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhajanromu|gokishadhajanromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhajanmunĂŒ|shadhajanmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhajankmunĂŒ|goshadhajankmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhajanmunĂŒ|gokishadhajanmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhajanmushĂ«|shadhajanmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhajankmushĂ«|goshadhajankmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhajanmushĂ«|gokishadhajanmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhajanmuro|shadhajanmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhajankmuro|goshadhajankmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhajanmuro|gokishadhajanmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
